title: Q2 Launch Readout
summary: Executive report template with outcomes, metrics, decisions, and next actions.
author: Chad Michael Michaels

sections.heading: Outcome
sections.body: Q2 launch achieved strong early adoption with stable performance and positive qualitative feedback from pilot users.

sections.heading: Decisions
bullets: Prioritize onboarding simplification in next sprint
Keep pricing unchanged through next review window
Expand pilot to two additional customer segments

sections.heading: Next actions
sections.body: Ship onboarding v2, add in-product milestone hints, and publish a customer-facing changelog update.
